raw_ocr.ws_snapshot: Sample_Student iki düzeyli bir karar ağacı çizmiş; kök düğümde şeker, ikinci dalda yağ özelliğini kullanmış. Eşik değerlerini ve dal yönlerini (≤ / >) doğru etiketlemiş. Yaprak düğümlerin tamamı yazılmış, yalnızca B12 boş.

cross_ws_consistency_with_WS5.consistency: MINOR DISCREPANCY — WS5 concludes şeker ≤ 8 is best (tie-break). WS6 root uses şeker ≤ 10. Both have MCR=0.20 so this is within acceptable range. Student may have reconsidered or applied WS5 insights differently in WS6.

cross_ws_consistency_with_WS7.consistency: CONSISTENT — WS7 rules match WS6 tree exactly

warnings: WS6_B12: blank leaf count notation. Minor — does not affect tree structure or AI-CFT assessment.
WS5 best threshold (şeker ≤ 8) differs from WS6 root (şeker ≤ 10) — both have MCR=0.20, minor discrepancy.

student_snapshot.llm_observations: Valid 2-level tree with correct operator directions, two different features, 3 correctly labeled leaf nodes. B12 blank (count notation) is a minor gap. Tree is well-structured and internally consistent.

WS6_tree_structure.rationale: Valid 2-level decision tree. Root = şeker (valid feature), threshold = ≤ 10 (valid threshold, consistent with WS5 exploration). Left branch uses yağ (second different feature, threshold ≤ 5). All 3 leaves correctly labeled. Left/right operators consistent throughout (≤ goes left, > goes right). Depth=2 meets minimum.
WS6_tree_structure.evidence_quote: Root: şeker ≤ 10 → Left: yağ ≤ 5 → Tavsiye edilir / Tavsiye edilmez; Right: Tavsiye edilmez

WS6_B3_B4_direction_labels.rationale: Branch labels correctly distinguish evet (≤ condition = true) and hayır (> condition = false). This shows understanding of how the binary split works, not just filling boxes.

WS6_B12.rationale: Leaf count notation blank. This is a minor item — affects completeness but not structural understanding of the tree.

summary.scoring_note: Tree structure is fully valid: correct features, correct operators, correct leaf labels, correct depth, two different features used. B12 (count notation) blank is the only gap — minor. This is the strongest structural evidence of Acquire-level AI-CFT understanding in the unplugged sequence.

Cross-WS consistency with WS7 is perfect. The slight threshold discrepancy with WS5 (8 vs 10) is within MCR-equivalent range and does not constitute an error.
